articles.title: 'We are at risk of a lost generation': One in six young people will not be in work or training in five years without action, report warns
articles.description: A major review examining the causes of rising youth unemployment says getting on the career ladder is now "out of reach" for many.

articles.title: Safety warning after nine water-related deaths during heatwave
articles.description: Charities urge people to take precautions after at least nine people died after getting into difficulty in water during the warm weather.

articles.title: Jill Biden says she thought husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
articles.description: The former US first lady told CBS News that she was frightened by Joe Biden's performance against Donald Trump.
